a:T1130f,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. relays signal from SAN to ventricles ✔</p>
<p>b. causes ventricular systole ✔</p>
<p>c. delays signal enabling both ventricles to contract simultaneously<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>delays signal so the atria empty before ventricular systole ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p><em>Not necessary to present answer in a table.</em></p>
<p><em>Award <strong>[1]</strong> for each set of corresponding structure and function.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/d/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","d"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.HL.TZ2.22"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","d-4-the-heart"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>State <strong>one</strong> function of the atrioventricular node.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[1]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Describe how the structure of cardiac muscle cells allows them to carry out their function.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[3]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>A large number could state one correct function of the atrioventricular node, mainly that it causes ventricular systole.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Many could provide a correct description including many elements, but many discussed the structure of the heart as a whole, rather than the cellular structure of cardiac muscle cells or discussed at length the myogenic nature of cardiac tissue.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
